title: AI Toolbox Client Entry
description: Schema for a single client entry in the .ai-toolbox/config.json clients registry.

tier.description: Capability tier. full = hooks + multi-agent + plan_mode, standard = hooks + sync, basic = file rules only.

router_file.description: Repo-root file the client uses as its primary instruction entry point (e.g. CLAUDE.md, QWEN.md). null if the client has no router file.

template_router.description: Path to template under .agent/templates/clients/ that generates the router_file. null when bootstrap creates it inline.

config_file.description: Repo-root configuration file for the client (e.g. .claude.json, .aider.conf.yml). null if not applicable.

template_config.description: Path to template under .agent/templates/clients/ that generates the config_file. null when not template-managed.

hooks.description: Whether the client supports automated hook execution. Hooks may be auto-installed or require manual setup depending on managed_by.

multi_agent.description: Whether the client supports parallel sub-agent orchestration.

file_rules.description: Whether the client honors file-based rule references (always true for any supported client).

plan_mode.description: Whether the client supports a dedicated planning mode that suspends execution until approval.

slash_commands.description: Whether the client supports /slash command syntax for skills or workflows.

autodetect_cmd.description: Shell command (typically the CLI binary name) used by setup.sh autodetection. null disables autodetection.

managed_by.description: How files for this client are produced: bootstrap-inline = generated as heredoc in bootstrap.sh; template = copied from .agent/templates/clients/; bootstrap-inline+template = mixed; manual = user installs themselves.

notes.description: Free-form notes about client-specific quirks, limitations, or setup steps.

extra_files.description: Additional files this client expects beyond router_file/config_file (e.g. .codex/hooks.json, .qwen/settings.json).

source.description: Source template path under .agent/templates/clients/ or null when generated inline.

target.description: Destination path relative to repo root.

condition.description: When this file should be installed: always = unconditional; autodetect = only when client autodetect succeeds.

managed_by.description: Override managed_by for this specific file (defaults to client-level managed_by).

allOf.description: If tier is 'full', plan_mode and multi_agent should both be present and true. Soft constraint — not enforced.
